title: M.A Jobs 2026 – Student Counsellor
shortInfo: National Institute of Technology Goa Recruitment 2026: 1 Student Counsellor vacancy. Apply online on or before 31 May 2026 through the official website of NIT Goa.

basic_details.job_title: NIT Goa Student Counsellor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Goa Recruitment 2026: 1 Student Counsellor vacancy. Apply online on or before 31 May 2026 through the official website of NIT Goa.

age_limit.details: Candidates should download and read the NIT Goa Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

qualification.details: B.A/B.Sc. (Psychology) with a certificate or Diploma in Counselling and a minimum of three years of experience in providing counselling to students at educational institutes. M.A/M.Sc. (Psychology) with a minimum of two years of experience in providing counselling to students at educational institutes. MBBS with a Master's/Diploma in Psychiatric Medicine and a minimum of one year of experience in providing counselling to students at educational institutes.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Goa to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the NIT Goa Student Counsellor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the NIT Goa Student Counsellor position is 31st May 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for the Student Counsellor post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.A/B.Sc. in Psychology with a counselling diploma and 3 years of experience, or M.A/M.Sc. in Psychology with 2 years of experience, or MBBS with a psychiatric medicine qualification and 1 year of experience.

faq.question: What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Student Counsellor position is 50 years.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for the NIT Goa Student Counsellor recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Student Counsellor position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 40,000/- per month.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for the Student Counsellor post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Student Counsellor at NIT Goa.

faq.question: What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the NIT Goa Student Counsellor recruitment must be submitted online.

faq.question: What is the selection process for the Student Counsellor role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Student Counsellor position will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Where is NIT Goa located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Goa is located in Cuncolim, Goa, with the pincode 403703.

faq.question: Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The job for the Student Counsellor position at NIT Goa is on a contractual basis.

seo_tags: National Institute of Technology Goa Student Counsellor Recruitment 2026
